# Salinity Screening

**Summary**: A preliminary test to identify the range of salt concentrations where a surfactant forms a Type III microemulsion.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-hajiyev|Hajiyev, 2023]] performed salinity screening at atmospheric pressure to select candidate formulations for HPHT testing.

## Key Results and Findings

- Identified suitable formulations showing Type III microemulsion before proceeding to high-pressure tests. ([[2023-hajiyev|Hajiyev, 2023, p. 12]])
